steps.title: Compare the two claims
steps.content: Text 1 claims Carracci was the first Bolognese artist to depict themself painting, around 1585. Text 2 says Fontana's 1577 self-portrait is the earliest Bolognese example of such a work and includes an easel.

steps.title: Use Text 2's correction
steps.content: Text 2 would challenge the first-artist claim by pointing to Fontana's earlier painting and its reference to the artist's craft. A mentions reputation, B speculates about intent, and C claims influence; none of those points is supported by Text 2. The answer is D.
